name: jinshouzhi
description: 金手指 - 成熟男士邀请制社交 MVP

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build:deploy: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && cd .. && npm run build
scripts.stop: lsof -ti :3001,:5173,:5174,:5175,:5176 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo 已尝试关闭旧进程
